description: Style NoteThis piece from mother earth references the brand's environmentally sound principles into it's overall aesthetic. Capturing India's rich textile traditions in designs and styles that reflect the sentiment of the global citizen - this is the brand's USP. This kurti is crafted from a soft fabric that's passed through the hands of rural weavers and craftsmen, who've used time tested traditions passed on from generation to generation to craft this unique piece. Style it with fitted denims or jeggings and chunky banglesProduct DetailsRed printed sleeveless kurta with blue trims, elastication at the shoulder and below the bust.Material and Care100% cottonHand wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent as colour may bleedFlat dry inside out in shadeWarm ironDo not soak in waterSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
